summary: Iteration 22: Three-part overhaul testing - Route Planner with fuel model and Mobi-Glass UI, Fleet integration with toggle, Curated weapon hardpoints. 18/18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Route planner shows HUD panels with fuel tracking, cross-system routes with jump waypoints, and fuel stops on long routes with low qd_range. Ships display quantum data (speed, range, fuel) and curated weapon hardpoints (Gladius=[3,3,3], Avenger Titan=[4,3,3], Arrow=[3,3,3,3], Cutlass Black=[4,4,3,3], Constellation Andromeda=[5,5,4,4]).

critical_code_review_comments: Route planner RoutePlanner.jsx has complete HUD/Mobi-Glass aesthetic with cyan styling
star_systems.py calculate_route() correctly implements fuel model with fuel_stops and refuel waypoints
live_api.py _CURATED_HARDPOINTS dict has 100+ ships with accurate weapon sizes
_get_curated_weapons() properly falls back to SLOT_MAP when ship not in curated list
Fleet toggle correctly switches ship selector between user's fleet and all ships
Cross-system routes include jump waypoints with type='jump' through gateways
Ships API returns quantum data (speed_kms, range_mkm, fuel_capacity) from Star Citizen Wiki API
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - Route data from star_systems.py, ship data from Star Citizen Wiki API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 tested three-part overhaul: 1) Route Planner with Mobi-Glass HUD aesthetic, fuel model (fuel_stops, fuel_remaining_pct), cross-system routes with jump waypoints through gateways, QD speed/range from ship quantum data. 2) Fleet integration via toggle switching between user fleet and all ships. 3) Curated weapon hardpoints for 100+ ships (Gladius=[3,3,3], Avenger Titan=[4,3,3], Arrow=[3,3,3,3], Cutlass Black=[4,4,3,3], Constellation Andromeda=[5,5,4,4]). All features working. Test user: testpilot/password123.

feature_verification_summary.route_planner_hud_aesthetic: PASS - HUD panels with Mobi-Glass styling, cyan color scheme
feature_verification_summary.route_planner_fuel_model: PASS - Routes return fuel_remaining_pct, fuel_stops, refuel waypoints
feature_verification_summary.route_planner_cross_system: PASS - Cross-system routes show CROSS-SYS tag, jump waypoints through gateways
feature_verification_summary.route_planner_qd_calculations: PASS - Calculates travel time based on QD speed, supports custom qd_speed/qd_range
feature_verification_summary.fleet_toggle: PASS - Toggle switches between FLEET and ALL SHIPS in ship selector
feature_verification_summary.ship_quantum_data: PASS - Ships show quantum speed, range, fuel capacity
feature_verification_summary.curated_weapon_hardpoints: PASS - Gladius [3,3,3], Avenger Titan [4,3,3], Arrow [3,3,3,3], Cutlass Black [4,4,3,3], Constellation Andromeda [5,5,4,4]
feature_verification_summary.loadout_builder_integration: PASS - Loadout builder displays correct weapon hardpoint slots
feature_verification_summary.chase_calculator: PASS - Returns can_catch, speed comparison, verdict
feature_verification_summary.star_map_canvas: PASS - Interactive canvas shows 3 systems (Stanton, Pyro, Nyx) with 80+ locations
